name: proc_access_win_susp_direct_ntopenprocess_call
raw_query: any where winlog.event_data.CallTrace:"UNKNOWN*" and (not ((winlog.event_data.TargetImage:"*vcredist_x64.exe" and process.executable:"*vcredist_x64.exe") or ((process.executable like~ ("*:\\Program Files (x86)\\*", "*:\\Program Files\\*", "*:\\Windows\\System32\\*", "*:\\Windows\\SysWOW64\\*", "*:\\Windows\\WinSxS\\*")) and (winlog.event_data.TargetImage like~ ("*:\\Program Files (x86)\\*", "*:\\Program Files\\*", "*:\\Windows\\System32\\*", "*:\\Windows\\SysWOW64\\*", "*:\\Windows\\WinSxS\\*"))) or winlog.provider_name:"Microsoft-Windows-Kernel-Audit-API-Calls")) and (not ((winlog.event_data.TargetImage:"*:\\Windows\\system32\\systeminfo.exe" and process.executable:"*setup64.exe") or (process.executable:"*:\\Windows\\Explorer.EXE" and winlog.event_data.TargetImage:"*:\\Program Files\\Cylance\\Desktop\\CylanceUI.exe") or (process.executable:"*AmazonSSMAgentSetup.exe" and winlog.event_data.TargetImage:"*AmazonSSMAgentSetup.exe") or (process.executable:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Programs\\Microsoft VS Code\\Code.exe" and winlog.event_data.TargetImage:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Programs\\Microsoft VS Code\\Code.exe") or (winlog.event_data.TargetImage:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Microsoft\\Teams\\current\\Teams.exe" and process.executable:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Microsoft\\Teams\\current\\Teams.exe") or (winlog.event_data.TargetImage:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Discord\\*" and winlog.event_data.TargetImage:"*\\Discord.exe") or (process.executable:"*\\AppData\\Local\\yammerdesktop\\app-*" and process.executable:"*\\Yammer.exe" and winlog.event_data.TargetImage:"*\\AppData\\Local\\yammerdesktop\\app-*" and winlog.event_data.TargetImage:"*\\Yammer.exe" and winlog.event_data.GrantedAccess:"0x1000") or winlog.event_data.TargetImage:"*\\Evernote\\Evernote.exe" or (process.executable:"*:\\Program Files\\Adobe\\Acrobat DC\\Acrobat\\*" and process.executable:"*\\AcroCEF.exe" and winlog.event_data.TargetImage:"*:\\Program Files\\Adobe\\Acrobat DC\\Acrobat\\*" and winlog.event_data.TargetImage:"*\\AcroCEF.exe")))
